description: Live GitHub + WakaTime activity over the last 7 days.

data.summary: This week, Ethan Qiu logged 18 hrs 49 mins of coding time, with a daily average of 3 hrs 9 mins. His activity was spread across 5 projects, and his most-used languages were Java, Other, Markdown, and TypeScript. He did not record any GitHub commits, pull requests, or new repositories this week.
